Device.description:
Network device configuration.

Represents a spine or leaf switch in the fabric with its hostname
and associated network interfaces.

Injected Dependencies:
    _fabric_asns (dict[str, int] | None): BGP ASN mapping injected by
        FabricDataModel during validation. Required for fabric_asn computed field.

Computed Fields:
    role (str): Device role derived from hostname (spine/leaf).
    fabric_asn (int): BGP ASN from fabric mapping (requires _fabric_asns).
    router_id (IPv4Address): Extracted from Loopback0 interface.
    vtep_ipv4 (IPv4Address): Extracted from Loopback1 interface.

Model Validators:
    inject_device_hostname: Injects hostname into all interfaces
        for Interface.description computed field generation.
    validate_required_interfaces: Validates Loopback0 exists on all devices
        and Loopback1 exists on leaf devices.

hostname.description: Unique hostname of the device (e.g., s1, l1, spine1, leaf1)
hostname.title: Hostname

interfaces.description: List of network interfaces configured on this device
interfaces.title: Interfaces

Device.title: Device

Interface.description:
Network interface configuration.

Represents a physical or logical network interface with IPv4/IPv6
addressing and connectivity information. Automatically generates
interface descriptions based on interface type and parent device.

Injected Dependencies:
    _device_hostname (str | None): Parent device hostname injected by
        Device model validator. Required for description computed field.
    _mgmt_vrf (str | None): Management VRF name injected by FabricDataModel.
        Required for mgmt_vrf computed field on Management0 interfaces.
    _devices (list[Device] | None): List of all devices in fabric injected by
        FabricDataModel. Required for remote_interface computed field on P2P links.

Computed Fields:
    description (str | None): Generated based on interface type and hostname.
        - Management0: "Management Interface | <HOSTNAME>"
        - Loopback0: "ROUTER_ID | EVPN_PEERING | <HOSTNAME>"
        - Loopback1: "VTEP_IP | VXLAN_DATA_PLANE | <HOSTNAME>"
        - Ethernet* (with remote_device): "P2P Link to <REMOTE_DEVICE>"
    mgmt_vrf (str | None): Returns injected VRF for Management0, None otherwise.
    remote_interface (str | None): Returns the name of the reciprocal interface
        on the remote device for P2P links. None for non-P2P interfaces.

Attributes:
    name: Interface name (e.g., Ethernet1, Management0, Loopback0).
    ipv4: IPv4 address with prefix length.
    ipv6: Optional IPv6 address with prefix length.
    remote_device: Hostname of connected remote device (for P2P links).

ipv4.description: IPv4 address with prefix length assigned to the interface (e.g., 10.254.1.0/31)
ipv4.title: Ipv4

ipv6.description: IPv6 address with prefix length assigned to the interface (e.g., 2001:db8::1/64)
ipv6.title: Ipv6

remote_device.description: Hostname of the remote device connected to this interface (None for loopback/management)
remote_device.title: Remote Device

Interface.title: Interface

ManagementPool.description:
Management network pool configuration.

Defines the IPv4 and IPv6 subnets allocated for out-of-band
management access to network devices.

ipv4_subnet.description: IPv4 subnet for out-of-band management network (e.g., 192.168.0.0/24)
ipv4_subnet.title: Ipv4 Subnet

ipv6_subnet.description: IPv6 subnet for out-of-band management network (e.g., 2001:db8::/64)
ipv6_subnet.title: Ipv6 Subnet

ManagementPool.title: ManagementPool

ReservedSupernets.description:
Reserved IP supernets for fabric allocation.

Defines the IP address pools reserved for different purposes
in the network fabric including point-to-point links, loopback
interfaces, and management networks.

p2p_pool.description: IPv4 supernet for point-to-point links between spine and leaf devices (e.g., 10.254.0.0/16)
p2p_pool.title: P2P Pool

loopback0_pool.description: IPv4 pool for Loopback0 interfaces used as BGP router IDs (e.g., 10.255.0.0/24)
loopback0_pool.title: Loopback0 Pool

loopback1_pool.description: IPv4 pool for Loopback1 interfaces used as VXLAN tunnel endpoints (VTEP) (e.g., 10.255.1.0/24)
loopback1_pool.title: Loopback1 Pool

management_pool.description: Management network configuration for out-of-band device access

ReservedSupernets.title: ReservedSupernets

Topology.description:
Network fabric topology structure.

Defines the physical topology of the fabric including all spine
and leaf devices in a 3-stage Clos architecture.

spines.description: List of spine switches in the fabric
spines.title: Spines

leaves.description: List of leaf switches in the fabric
leaves.title: Leaves

Topology.title: Topology

description: JSON Schema for network fabric data model validation and documentation

schema_version.description: Version of the data model schema (e.g., 1.0.0)
schema_version.title: Schema Version

schema_description.description: Human-readable description of this fabric configuration
schema_description.title: Schema Description

fabric_name.description: Unique name identifying this fabric (e.g., dc1, production-fabric)
fabric_name.title: Fabric Name

mgmt_vrf.description: VRF name for management interfaces (e.g., MGMT, management)
mgmt_vrf.title: Mgmt Vrf

reserved_supernets.description: IP address pools reserved for fabric infrastructure

fabric_asns.description: BGP ASN assignments by device role (e.g., {'spines': 64600, 'l1': 65001})
fabric_asns.title: Fabric Asns

topology.description: Physical topology structure with all devices

title: Fabric Data Model Schema
